title: polypodium polypodioides
intro: Polypodium polypodioides, also known as the Polypodium fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Polypodium polypodioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against fungal and bacterial infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
